title: cnidium bhutanicum
intro: Cnidium bhutanicum, also known as the Cnidium fruit or Yang-Chen-Shan, is a type of flowering plant native to the mountainous regions of China. It is commonly used in traditional Chinese medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Cnidium bhutanicum include reducing pain and inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and enhancing immune function. Cnidium bhutanicum is often prepared as a herbal supplement, tea, or powder, and can be found in various forms, including capsules and extracts, for use in traditional medicine.
